mapper.sql: p.id, p.user_id, p.category_id, p.title, p.description, p.original_price, p.price, p.quality, p.location, p.trade_mode, p.view_count, p.favorite_count, p.product_status, p.audit_status, p.audit_remark, p.audit_time, p.audit_user_id, p.create_time, p.update_time, p.deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM product p WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.deleted = 0

SELECT , u.nickname AS seller_nickname, u.avatar AS seller_avatar, u.credit_score AS seller_credit_score, c.name AS category_name, (SELECT pi.image_url FROM product_image pi WHERE pi.product_id = p.id AND pi.is_cover = 1 LIMIT 1) AS cover_image FROM product p LEFT JOIN `user` u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (user_id, category_id, title, description, original_price, price, quality, location, trade_mode, product_status, audit_status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{originalPrice}, #{price}, #{quality}, #{location}, #{tradeMode}, #{productStatus}, #{auditStatus})
mapper.update:
UPDATE product
category_id = #{categoryId}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, original_price = #{originalPrice}, price = #{price}, quality = #{quality}, location = #{location}, trade_mode = #{tradeMode}, product_status = #{productStatus}, audit_status = #{auditStatus},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE product SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE product SET product_status = #{productStatus} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE product SET audit_status = #{auditStatus}, audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, audit_user_id = #{auditUserId}, audit_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE product SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE product SET favorite_count = favorite_count + #{delta} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT , u.nickname AS seller_nickname, u.avatar AS seller_avatar, u.credit_score AS seller_credit_score, c.name AS category_name, (SELECT pi.image_url FROM product_image pi WHERE pi.product_id = p.id AND pi.is_cover = 1 LIMIT 1) AS cover_image FROM product p LEFT JOIN `user` u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product WHERE deleted = 0 AND audit_status = #{auditStatus}
